competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
fetched_urls: WebSearch: OpenAI ChatGPT new feature announcement July 9 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: "ChatGPT Work" livestream features team collaboration workspace (ok)
WebSearch: GPT-5.6 ultra mode subagents details (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1三源持续403，转WebSearch。本轮捕获晚于baseline（7/8 16:08）的新内容，均为7/9当日：①GPT-5.6正式公开发布（Sol/Terra/Luna三档），Sol新增'ultra mode'——从单一顺序推理链转为模型内嵌的multi-agent system，将任务分解并行spawn多个subagent协同、mid-task互相协调、最后synthesis结果，Terminal-Bench 2.1从88.8%提升至91.9%；②OpenAI以直播形式推出'ChatGPT Work'——团队协作workspace层，含Shared Projects（成员异步协作，可在他人更新基础上继续、可branch他人对话开新分支探索）、跨工具Connectors（拉取Google Drive/SharePoint/GitHub/Teams/Gmail上下文）、Group Chats（多人与AI同thread'live'共创）、企业级角色与分组权限管理；③GPT-Live全双工语音发布（7/8），替代Advanced Voice Mode。三者中ChatGPT Work与meee2结构重叠最值得关注。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1三源持续403，转WebSearch。本轮捕获晚于baseline（7/8 16:08）的新内容，均为7/9当日：①GPT-5.6正式公开发布（Sol/Terra/Luna三档），Sol新增'ultra mode'

changes.description: 首次捕获'ChatGPT Work'团队协作workspace层直播发布：Shared Projects支持成员异步协作与branch他人对话、跨工具Connectors拉取上下文、Group Chats多人live共创，baseline未记录
changes.evidence: 「Project members can work asynchronously, with the ability to build on each other's updates, start their own one-on-one conversations with ChatGPT, or branch another member's conversation to explore a new idea.」「ChatGPT pulls in relevant context from tools your team uses every day, like Google Drive, SharePoint, GitHub, Microsoft Teams, or Gmail.」「ChatGPT Group Chats let multiple people collaborate with AI in the same conversation thread...brainstorm, assign tasks, analyze documents, and co-create content together—live.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'branch another member's conversation'（分支他人对话继续探索）与meee2锚点4（跨session/跨owner的artifact pull）在'拉取他人会话产出继续工作'结构上有明确呼应；Group Chats的'together—live'表述与锚点2（live link而非snapshot）方向一致；Connectors跨工具拉取上下文也部分呼应锚点2。但整体仍是'团队共享同一chat/project'范式，未见'人=慢session、AI=快session、同一协议对等'（锚点1完整表述）或peripheral菜单栏层（锚点5）。判定为向meee2定位延伸的明确信号，达到hi级别信号强度，触发alert

changes.description: GPT-5.6正式公开发布（Sol/Terra/Luna），Sol新增'ultra mode'：模型内嵌multi-agent system，任务分解后并行spawn subagent、mid-task协调、最后synthesis
changes.evidence: 「Ultra mode is a new operating mode available only on Sol, which shifts the model from a single sequential reasoning chain to a multi-agent system (MAS) embedded in the model itself.」「When ultra mode handles a request, it decomposes the task and spawns parallel subagent processes, each of which works on a different component simultaneously before synthesizing results.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：模型内嵌的subagent并行协调与meee2'session同构'锚点1在'多agent协同'层面有表层呼应，但这是纯AI侧的模型能力（无人类作为peer session的框架），且不涉及live artifact/canvas，结构重叠有限，不构成threat_signal

key_findings: 首次捕获'ChatGPT Work'团队协作workspace发布，Shared Projects的'branch他人对话'与Group Chats的'live共创'是本次最值得关注的结构信号
GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra mode将subagent并行协调作为一手能力内嵌进模型
GPT-Live全双工语音替代Advanced Voice Mode，与meee2无结构重叠
官方一手源（news/rss.xml、index页）本次持续403

competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1/2持续403（新增尝试cursor.com/blog/grok-4-5与forum.cursor.com同样403），转WebSearch。本轮捕获两类内容：①真正晚于baseline（v3.10, 6/30）的新动态——Cursor与SpaceXAI联合发布Grok 4.5模型（7/8-7/9），定位'the first built for more than software engineering'，覆盖coding/data science/finance/legal，桌面/web/iOS/CLI/SDK全平台可用，$2/M input起；②baseline此前WebSearch未命中、但实际早于本窗口（6/16 Compile 2026大会）发生的内容——Origin（AI-agent-first代码托管平台，脱胎于Graphite收购，秋季上线）与Automations（'automatically start coding agents from codebase changes, Slack messages, or timers'）。②类内容如实标注为'本次首次抓取但发生时间早于baseline窗口'。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1/2持续403（新增尝试cursor.com/blog/grok-4-5与forum.cursor.com同样403），转WebSearch。本轮捕获两类内容：①真正晚于baseline（v3.10

changes.description: Cursor与SpaceXAI联合发布Grok 4.5模型（7/8-7/9），定位为'不止软件工程'的通用知识工作模型，桌面/web/iOS/CLI/SDK全平台上线
changes.evidence: 「Cursor introduced Grok 4.5, their most intelligent model and the first built for more than software engineering.」「Grok 4.5 can handle difficult, long-running tasks...whether in software engineering, data science, finance, legal work, or anything else you do on a computer.」

changes.description: 首次抓取到Compile 2026大会（6/16，早于baseline窗口）披露的Origin代码托管平台与Automations功能，baseline此前未记录
changes.evidence: 「Origin, a code storage and Git hosting platform fundamentally redesigned to treat AI agents as first-class citizens...Origin is expected to launch in fall 2026.」「Cursor launched Automations, a new way to automatically start coding agents from codebase changes, Slack messages, or timers, helping teams review code, run security audits, handle incidents, and send weekly summaries.」
changes.source_url: WebSearch聚合（forum.cursor.com一手帖本次403未能直连）
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：Automations'从Slack消息/定时器自动触发coding agent'与meee2锚点4（跨工具/跨owner触发）在'跨工具事件触发agent'层面有浅层呼应，但仍是单向触发而非双向live artifact pull；Origin是Git托管基础设施定位，与meee2的session/canvas/peripheral核心锚点无结构重叠

key_findings: Grok 4.5发布是本轮真正晚于baseline窗口的新内容，定位'超越软件工程'的通用模型
Origin/Automations为Compile 2026（6/16）披露内容，baseline此前WebSearch未命中，本次补记
均未触碰meee2差异化锚点，威胁等级维持crit（基于既有结构重叠，非本轮新变化）

competitors.name: Windsurf (Devin Desktop)
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Devin Desktop Windsurf news update July 9 2026 (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1持续403，转WebSearch。本轮捕获晚于baseline（7/8记录Claude Opus 4.8/Devin Local 2026.5.26/3.1系列）的新内容：Claude Sonnet 5已上线Devin Desktop与Devin CLI（较Sonnet 4.6省约30%配额，至8/31）；新增Kimi K2.7与GLM 5.2模型支持（Pro/Max/Teams计划7/5前不计配额）；Devin Review新增安全审查——'catching auth bypasses and logic flaws that pattern-matching scanners miss'并提供从发现到修复的完整remediation；Devin Local新增孤儿ACP进程清理（含Windows）、修复TLS拦截代理下analytics连接失败、autonomous模式产出可review的diff、新增/mcp斜杠命令附带live MCP server状态面板。均为模型接入/工程稳定性优化。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1持续403，转WebSearch。本轮捕获晚于baseline（7/8记录Claude Opus 4.8/Devin Local 2026.5.26/3.1系列）的新内容：Claude Sonnet 5已上线De

changes.description: 新增Claude Sonnet 5/Kimi K2.7/GLM 5.2模型支持、Devin Review安全审查（含完整remediation）、Devin Local进程清理修复、新增/mcp命令live状态面板
changes.evidence: 「Claude Sonnet 5 is now live in Devin Desktop and Devin CLI...using roughly 30% less quota than Claude Sonnet 4.6 through August 31, 2026.」「Every pull request in Devin Review now gets a security review, with Devin catching auth bypasses and logic flaws that pattern-matching scanners miss, with full remediation from finding to fix.」「Added an /mcp slash command with a live MCP server status panel.」
changes.source_url: WebSearch聚合（docs.devin.ai/desktop/changelog一手页本次未直连尝试，HN持续403）
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'/mcp live MCP server状态面板'触碰'live'关键词但仅为状态监控UI，非meee2锚点2（跨工具artifact live link）意义上的live；其余均为模型接入与工程修复，无结构性重叠

key_findings: 本轮新增内容集中在模型矩阵扩充（Sonnet 5/Kimi K2.7/GLM 5.2）与Devin Review安全审查能力
新增/mcp命令live状态面板与Devin Local进程管理修复，均为体验/稳定性优化

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Anthropic Claude new feature announcement July 9 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: Anthropic Claude Reflect dashboard usage tracking feature (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: CHANGELOG.md一手抓取：较baseline记录的v2.1.204新增v2.1.205，含大量background/subagent相关修复——'Fixed background agents showing incorrect status after resuming with SendMessage'、'Fixed session-to-PR linking missing PRs from Bash calls exceeding 30K limit'、'Fixed Cowork VM-mode local-agent sessions failing with Not logged in error'、'Added auto mode rule blocking tampering with session transcript files'等，均为既有background/Cowork机制的工程修复而非新结构。WebSearch首次捕获'Claude Reflect'：7/9发布的用量回顾dashboard（对标Spotify Wrapped/手机屏幕时间），展示话题分布/使用习惯/任务类型，支持按1/3/6/12个月回看，可设置quiet hours与break nudges，并周期性提出'What's one thing you want to keep doing yourself, even if Claude could do it faster?'等反思问题，面向Free/Pro/Max用户beta开放。
competitors.content_hash: CHANGELOG.md一手抓取：较baseline记录的v2.1.204新增v2.1.205，含大量background/subagent相关修复——'Fixed background agents showing incorrect statu

changes.description: CHANGELOG新增v2.1.205：大量background/subagent/session-to-PR linking相关修复，均为既有机制稳定性优化
changes.evidence: 「Fixed background agents showing incorrect status after resuming with SendMessage.」「Fixed session-to-PR linking missing PRs from Bash calls exceeding 30K limit.」「Improved agent view linking PRs edited, merged, commented, or pushed.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'session-to-PR linking'/'agent view linking PRs'是Claude Code既有的session-外部artifact关联机制的修复，与meee2锚点2（跨工具artifact live link）方向接近但属既有功能的bug修复而非新能力，不构成新的threat_signal

changes.description: 首次捕获'Claude Reflect'用量回顾dashboard发布（7/9）：展示话题/习惯/任务类型分布，支持quiet hours与break nudges，周期性反思提问
changes.evidence: 「A new way to reflect on how you use Claude」「periodically surfacing questions like, 'What's one thing you want to keep doing yourself, even if Claude could do it faster?'」「Users can set quiet hours, schedule break nudges after a chosen amount of Claude use.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：Reflect是用量分析/数字健康类功能，聚焦'反思AI使用习惯'，与meee2的session同构/live link/descriptive canvas/artifact pull/peripheral五条锚点均无结构重叠，仅记录不构成threat_signal

key_findings: CHANGELOG新增v2.1.205，均为background/subagent/PR-linking机制的工程修复
首次捕获'Claude Reflect'用量回顾功能（7/9），定位数字健康/使用习惯反思，与meee2无结构重叠
本轮未发现Cowork team sharing（baseline alert中建议追踪的能力）上线迹象

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
fetched_urls: WebSearch: GitHub Copilot new features agent workspace update July 9 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: GitHub Copilot "chronicle" session sync chat history across machines (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: 官方feed及changelog详情页持续403，转WebSearch。本轮捕获晚于baseline（7/8记录的6/2 Copilot app技术预览）的新内容——VS Code 2026年6月版本发布（7/8披露）：①Agents window新增并行session管理，支持side-by-side运行多个session、单session多chat、分组/重排组织session；②Chronicle/session sync功能：Copilot CLI/云端agent/code review/VS Code/JetBrains/Copilot app的session数据默认同步至GitHub账号，支持/chronicle命令用自然语言查询跨机器/跨workspace的历史session，生成站会报告、改进建议；③浏览器工具（agent驱动真实浏览器、导航live网页、结果回灌chat）转为GA；④session/delegated work/额外Copilot spend的成本可见性增强。Chronicle的跨工具session统一同步与查询是本轮最值得关注的结构信号。
competitors.content_hash: 官方feed及changelog详情页持续403，转WebSearch。本轮捕获晚于baseline（7/8记录的6/2 Copilot app技术预览）的新内容——VS Code 2026年6月版本发布（7/8披露）

changes.description: 首次捕获Chronicle/session sync：CLI/云端agent/code review/VS Code/JetBrains/Copilot app的session数据默认同步至GitHub账号，可跨机器/跨workspace查询历史session
changes.evidence: 「Every time you use Copilot CLI, your session data is recorded on your local machine, including your prompts, Copilot's responses, the tools that were used, and details of files that were modified. By default, session data is also synced to your GitHub account.」「This lets you query all of your past sessions, including sessions from Copilot CLI, Copilot cloud agent, Copilot code review, VS Code, JetBrains, and the GitHub Copilot app.」
changes.source_url: WebSearch聚合（github.blog changelog一手页本次403未能直连）
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'跨CLI/云端agent/code review/VS Code/JetBrains/桌面app统一同步session并可查询'与meee2锚点1（session同构，同一协议下的连续性）在'session作为跨工具一等公民并可被检索延续'层面有明确结构呼应，是本轮除OpenAI外第二个触及核心锚点的信号，判定为hi级别信号，触发alert

changes.description: Agents window新增并行session管理（side-by-side多session、单session多chat、分组重排）；浏览器工具转GA；session/delegated work成本可见性增强
changes.evidence: 「The Agents window has been enhanced with new capabilities for keeping parallel sessions and chats organized, including the ability to run sessions side by side, use multiple chats in one session, and organize sessions by grouping or rearranging them.」「Browser tools for GitHub Copilot in VS Code are now generally available, allowing agents to drive a real browser, navigate live web apps, and feed findings back into the chat.」

key_findings: 首次捕获Chronicle跨工具session同步与查询功能，是本轮结构性关注点
Agents window并行session管理与浏览器工具GA均为体验增强
官方changelog页本次持续403

competitors.name: Notion AI

competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1两源持续403，转WebSearch。本轮首次捕获baseline未记录的重大内容：Notion 3.6（7/1正式版本号，功能本身5月已预告）'External Agents'——Claude与Cursor成为Notion内首批External Agents，官方原话'Your team already collaborates in Notion. Now your favorite agents do too. Assign them tasks from a board shared with your whole team. @-mention them like teammates. Watch them run.'agent可读写页面/数据库属性/生成内容。同时新增'Interactive HTML Blocks'——'AI agents生成的可交互HTML块直接活在Notion页面里，团队成员可共同使用或迭代'。另有Notion Workers开发者运行时（数据库同步/agent工具/webhook均由此驱动）、Excel/PPT/Word文件读写、Custom Agent管理员spend管控。External Agents的'@-mention like teammates'与meee2核心锚点1高度呼应，本轮判定威胁等级由md上调至hi。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1两源持续403，转WebSearch。本轮首次捕获baseline未记录的重大内容：Notion 3.6（7/1正式版本号，功能本身5月已预告）'External Agents'——Claude与Cursor成为N

changes.description: 首次捕获Notion 3.6'External Agents'（Claude+Cursor）：外部AI agent作为团队看板成员被分配任务、@-mention调用、实时观察其运行，加上'活在页面里'的Interactive HTML Blocks，baseline未记录
changes.evidence: 「Your team already collaborates in Notion. Now your favorite agents do too. Assign them tasks from a board shared with your whole team. @-mention them like teammates. Watch them run.」「Notion Agents can now create interactive HTML blocks that live in Notion, so anyone on your team can use them or iterate on them.」
changes.source_url: https://x.com/NotionHQ/status/2069816393395012009（官方推文）+ www.notion.com/releases/2026-07-01（一手release页本次403未能直连，经letsdatascience.com/mindstudio.ai交叉确认）
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'@-mention them like teammates'——把AI agent作为看板上与人类平等的可分配任务对象，与meee2锚点1（人=慢session，AI=快session，同一协议，人在agent图内）在'人机在同一协作图/看板中对等出现'的结构上高度呼应；'HTML blocks that live in Notion...anyone can use them or iterate'与锚点2（跨工具artifact live link，非snapshot）也有明确呼应。两条锚点同时被触碰，判定为向meee2定位延伸的明确信号，威胁等级由md上调至hi，触发alert

key_findings: 首次捕获External Agents（Claude+Cursor作为Notion看板'teammate'）与Interactive HTML Blocks，威胁等级由md上调至hi
'@-mention them like teammates'是本轮跨全部竞品中与meee2锚点1语言最接近的一条官方表述
Notion Workers开发者运行时/文件格式支持/Custom Agent spend管控均为配套基础设施，非独立结构信号

competitors.raw_snapshot: 转WebSearch。核实Chat Branching（对话save point分支）为早于baseline窗口的既有功能（非本轮新变化）。本轮真正晚于baseline（v0.66, 6/24）的新版本：Raycast for Windows v0.67（7/3发布）——新增按文本内容搜索文件（Root Search/File Search可匹配文件内正文而不仅文件名）、AI多选提问支持、按住说话（push-to-talk）听写。macOS端最新版本号推进至1.104.21（7/6），具体条目未获一手确认。均为渐进式UX功能，未见结构性定位变化。

competitors.raw_snapshot: PH官方feed/日榜页/HN持续403，转WebSearch。核实7/8日榜：Gemini Spark（24/7个人agent）、Agent Arena（agent对战评测）、Atlas（企业上下文理解层）、ModuleX（预连接AI workspace）、SquidHub（多人+多AI agent协作环境）、Cewsco/DMV/LockIn MCP/Crodox等。其中SquidHub命中watch_keywords（agent/collaboration/human-AI）达阈值且结构重叠显著：官方定位'Multiplayer mode for humans and AI'，团队成员与其AI agent（'Squids'）在共享房间实时协作，turn-taking轮流发言避免多agent同时抢答，'The human stays the decider — agents surface the trade-offs, teammates make the call'。经交叉检索，该产品实际上线时间可能早至6月下旬（非严格7/8当日新品），如实标注日期存疑，但baseline此前未记录，本次首次捕获。
competitors.content_hash: PH官方feed/日榜页/HN持续403，转WebSearch。核实7/8日榜：Gemini Spark（24/7个人agent）、Agent Arena（agent对战评测）、Atlas（企业上下文理解层）、ModuleX（预连接AI

changes.description: SquidHub——'humans and AI多人协作'平台，团队成员与其AI agent在共享房间实时协作、turn-taking发言、人类保留最终决策权。命中watch_keywords：agent、collaboration、human-AI（3项，超过阈值），建议纳入sources.json持续追踪
changes.evidence: 「SquidHub is a multiplayer AI platform where teammates and their AI agents (Squids) collaborate in shared rooms, in real time.」「Turn-taking means you never get conflicting answers all at once — one Squid speaks per turn...The human stays the decider — agents surface the trade-offs, teammates make the call.」
changes.source_url: https://www.producthunt.com/products/squidhub（一手PH产品页本次未直连尝试，经squidhub.ai官网及WebSearch聚合确认）
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'The human stays the decider'——人类与多个AI agent在共享房间中turn-taking协作、人类始终作为决策者而非被动observer——与meee2锚点1（人=慢session，AI=快session，同一协议，人在agent图内）在'人机同处一个协作结构、人是graph中的active participant'层面高度呼应，是本轮全部竞品中结构重叠最直接的一例。但未见'跨工具artifact live link'（锚点2）、'descriptive-first flow emerge'（锚点3）、跨owner的artifact pull（锚点4）或peripheral菜单栏层（锚点5）信号，产品定位仍是独立全屏multiplayer聊天室而非peripheral/跨工具形态。判定为hi级别信号，触发alert，建议持续观察其融资/增长动态

key_findings: SquidHub'humans and AI多人协作房间'+'The human stays the decider'是本轮跨全部竞品结构重叠最直接的发现，触发alert
Gemini Spark/Agent Arena/Atlas/ModuleX等其余7/8上新产品watch_keywords命中不足阈值，不计入entrant
PH官方feed与日榜页本次持续403，7/9当日榜单未能直连获取

competitors.name: GitHub Claude Code 生态雷达
competitors.raw_snapshot: 本源首次纳入sources.json，baseline为空，全部结果视为首次发现。四个查询按full_name去重合并后，按'pushed_at近30天内或created_at近60天内'过滤活跃仓库，排除ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills、gsd-build/get-shit-done等老仓库。命中watch_keywords（≥2项）且结构值得关注：mcoquet/cockpit（'macOS menubar application for managing Claude Code projects with embedded terminal'，命中menu bar+terminal，与meee2锚点5高度直接呼应，虽仅0 star）；kooky（540 star，'Sidebar workspaces...live workspace state with one-click Node and branch switching'，命中terminal/sidebar/workspace/live/agent多项）；fanbox（907 star，'files on left, agents on right, changes in center'布局范式）；agentwire-dev/handmux/agent-cockpit/TerMinal/rurutia等一批'cockpit for Claude Code'仓库（均为terminal+agent+cockpit/session组合）。该genre本身（多个独立作者各自收敛到'files+agents+终端cockpit'布局）是值得记录的meta信号，但个体项目均为hobby规模，暂不构成crit/hi级别威胁。
competitors.content_hash: 本源首次纳入sources.json，baseline为空，全部结果视为首次发现。四个查询按full_name去重合并后，按'pushed_at近30天内或created_at近60天内'过滤活跃仓库，排除ComposioHQ

changes.description: mcoquet/cockpit——macOS菜单栏应用管理Claude Code项目、内嵌终端，命中watch_keywords中的'menu bar'与'terminal'，与meee2锚点5（peripheral层，菜单栏，不切焦点）字面直接匹配，虽为0 star的早期个人项目
changes.evidence: 「macOS menubar application for managing Claude Code projects with embedded terminal」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'menubar application'+'managing Claude Code projects'与meee2锚点5（peripheral层：菜单栏，不切焦点，戳任何session）在产品形态层面直接对应，是GitHub生态中已有开发者独立验证'菜单栏管理coding agent session'这一形态需求的信号。但项目规模极小（0 star，个人早期项目），尚不构成实际竞争威胁，仅作为形态验证信号记录，不触发alert

changes.description: kooky（540 star）——'Sidebar workspaces; live workspace state with one-click Node and branch switching'，命中terminal/sidebar/workspace/live/agent等多项watch_keywords，是本批中star数最高的活跃项目
changes.evidence: 「A minimal modern terminal for AI coding experience — Sidebar workspaces; horizontal / vertical split panes; one-click agent launch; per-agent activity readout; live workspace state with one-click Node and branch switching.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 推断：'live workspace state'与meee2锚点2（跨工具artifact live link，非snapshot）在'实时反映workspace状态而非静态快照'层面有浅层呼应，但仍是单一terminal内的多pane管理工具，非跨工具/跨owner的live link，结构重叠有限

key_findings: 本源首次纳入，共发现约50个仓库，经活跃度过滤后约35个仓库进入raw_snapshot供下次去重
'cockpit for Claude Code'（files+agents+terminal三栏布局）已成为GitHub上多个独立作者收敛的共识范式，是值得持续观察的meta信号
mcoquet/cockpit的'菜单栏管理'定位与meee2锚点5字面直接匹配，但项目规模过小，暂不构成实际威胁
未发现单个仓库达到hi/crit级别的结构重叠或显著规模，本轮无alert

alerts.headline: OpenAI直播发布'ChatGPT Work'团队协作workspace：Shared Projects支持'branch他人对话继续探索'，Group Chats强调'together—live'，是本轮触碰meee2锚点4/2最直接的官方动态
alerts.evidence: 「Project members can work asynchronously, with the ability to build on each other's updates, start their own one-on-one conversations with ChatGPT, or branch another member's conversation to explore a new idea.」「ChatGPT Group Chats let multiple people collaborate with AI in the same conversation thread...brainstorm, assign tasks, analyze documents, and co-create content together—live.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 建议尽快实测ChatGPT Work的'branch conversation'具体交互（是否支持跨owner无缝拉取、是否保留live关联还是fork后即断开），并评估其与Cowork（baseline已捕获）是否会合流成OpenAI的统一'workspace+session'产品线；同时对比meee2的F9跨session/跨owner artifact pull在'拉取后是否保持live同步'上的差异化是否需要在传播中强化。

alerts.headline: GitHub Copilot新增Chronicle：CLI/云端agent/code review/VS Code/JetBrains/桌面app的session统一同步至GitHub账号并可跨机器查询，是session-as-first-class-citizen范式的又一官方验证
alerts.evidence: 「By default, session data is also synced to your GitHub account.」「This lets you query all of your past sessions, including sessions from Copilot CLI, Copilot cloud agent, Copilot code review, VS Code, JetBrains, and the GitHub Copilot app.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 建议评估meee2在'跨工具session统一识别'（锚点1）上相对Chronicle的差异点是否清晰——尤其Chronicle目前是'历史session检索'而非meee2的'session同构+人在agent图内'实时协作，可作为下一轮内容传播的对比锚点。

alerts.headline: Notion 3.6正式引入External Agents（Claude+Cursor），官方原话'@-mention them like teammates'，威胁等级由md上调至hi，是本轮语言上与meee2锚点1最接近的竞品动态
alerts.evidence: 「Your team already collaborates in Notion. Now your favorite agents do too. Assign them tasks from a board shared with your whole team. @-mention them like teammates. Watch them run.」「Notion Agents can now create interactive HTML blocks that live in Notion, so anyone on your team can use them or iterate on them.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 建议密切追踪Notion External Agents是否会开放更多第三方agent接入（目前仅Claude+Cursor），以及'HTML blocks that live in Notion'是否会演化为通用的跨工具live artifact；同时评估meee2'人=慢session，AI=快session'的表述相较Notion'@-mention like teammates'在精确度上的差异化传播空间。

alerts.competitor_name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达 / SquidHub
alerts.headline: 新发现SquidHub：'Multiplayer mode for humans and AI'，官方明确'The human stays the decider'，是本轮全部竞品中与meee2'人在agent图内'锚点结构重叠最直接的新入局者
alerts.evidence: 「SquidHub is a multiplayer AI platform where teammates and their AI agents (Squids) collaborate in shared rooms, in real time.」「The human stays the decider — agents surface the trade-offs, teammates make the call.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 建议将SquidHub加入sources.json独立追踪（而非仅留在PH雷达内），持续观察其融资/用户增长/是否补齐跨工具live link与peripheral层能力；评估其'shared rooms turn-taking'与meee2'同一协议下人机对等'在具体交互细节上的差异，作为竞品分析素材。
